audit_items.proof_trace: EIP-7825 GAS_CAP constant (MAX_TX_GAS_LIMIT_OSAKA) is defined in external alloy-eips crate and enforced by external revm crate. alloy-evm only passes the configuration value through cfg_env.tx_gas_limit_cap. Both constant definition and enforcement logic are in external dependencies, making this property out-of-scope for alloy-evm audit.
